# Learning Progress Tracker

Welcome to my GitHub repository dedicated to tracking my progress in learning from @asaprogrammer\_'s YouTube channel. Here, I document my journey of learning real-world application development.

## Learning Focus

Currently, I'm focusing on mastering the following topics:

### Building Real-World Applications

Dive deep into understanding how real-world applications are crafted. Explore practical examples and gain insights into industry-standard practices.

### MERN Stack Development

Dive into the MERN (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js) stack, a powerful combination for modern web development. Learn to build dynamic and scalable web applications.

### Essential Tools and Libraries

Explore essential tools and libraries such as bcryptjs, cookie-parser, dotenv, express, jsonwebtoken, mongoose, and socket.io. Understand their role in enhancing the functionality and security of web applications.

## Progress Tracking

Feel free to browse through my commits and branches to track my progress in mastering these topics. Each commit represents a step forward in my learning journey.

Get ready to witness my growth as I tackle challenges and learn new concepts in the realm of web development!
